of Mission, British Embassy Washington, FCDO) and others

Subject: Re: Matthew Doyle programme

Also light supper for Matthew this evening at residence

OFFICIAL

From: Peter Mandelson
Sent: Thursday, February 20, 2025 5:14:08 PM
To: Jcs ; James Roscoe
Cc: Nicholas Alton ;
Subject: Re: Matthew Doyle programme
Thanks. Dinner is not for Palantir it is for Jacob Helberg at the State Department.

Get Outlook for i0S

From: Jes

Sent: Thursday, February 20, 2025 5:05:03 PM

To: James Roscoe

Cc: Peter Mandelson ; Nicholas Alton ; Jes
Subject: Matthew Doyle programme

OFFICIAL

James -

Here's where we are with Matthew. Not stellar but credible- some interesting calls that will give

a better on ground flavour of where the administration direction and landscape. Unfortunate
combination of Friday(tricky), 24hr notice and moreover CPAC in National Harbour being the

centre of gravity this weekend.

Thursday

224

430pm - arrive Dulles - travel to Residence
6pm - DHM drinks, Edgevale
Friday

9am - Third Party , analysis on: admin polling; US perspectives trade
and Ukraine; midterm trends. Residence

10am - Peter/Third /Matthew visit discussion, Residence
11pm - Steven Cheung, WH comms director. Greenbery's coffee shop

1230pm - Heritage Foundation, Nile Gardener. Heritage led Project 2025 that has been largely
adopted by the administration. Lunch, The Ned

230pm - Senate, Republican Leader Sen Thune, Ryan Wasse, Comms Director
7pm - HMA / Plantir tech dinner
Declined/navailable:

* Chris Ruddy, Newsmax

+ JD Vance comms director

+ NSA comms director

+ WH spokesperson

+ WSJ bureau chief

* Fox bureau chief

* (Brietbart / Newsmax bureaus - top teams at CPAC)
+ Bret Bier, Fox

¢ Lester holt, NBC

* TikTok, VP gov affairs

JCS

Director of Communications & Spokesperson

British Embassy Washington
Personal

OFFICIAL

225


From: Peter Mandelson Personal

Sent: Fri 21/02/2025 3:34:00 PM (UTC)

To: Matthew Doyle Personal

Subject: Fw: O/S Letter from HMA Wash to Foreign Secretary: View from Washington

parsing_notes: Extract structured email headers (From, To, Cc, Subject, Date/Sent) for each message in the chain. Identify reply/forward nesting depth. Parse each message body separately. Redacted addresses appear as 'PERSONAL' — names are retained. Build sender→recipient edges per message for communication graph.
